message.content:
@startuml
title System Sequence Diagram: Record vaccine administration

actor Nurse
boundary ":System"

Nurse -> ":System" : **1** starts recording the administration of a vaccine to a SNS user
Nurse <-- ":System" : **2** requests to select the SNS user
Nurse -> ":System" : **3** selects the SNS user
Nurse <-- ":System" : **4** shows SNS user information (Name, Age and Adverse Reactions) and ask for confirmation
Nurse -> ":System" : **5** confirms the information
Nurse <-- ":System" : **6** requests to select the vaccine to be administered and the lot number
Nurse -> ":System" : **7** selects the vaccine and inputs lot number
Nurse <-- ":System" : **8** shows data and request confirmation
Nurse -> ":System" : **9** confirms the data
Nurse <-- ":System" : **10** informs operation success and asks if should start the recovery period
Nurse -> ":System" : **11** confirms to start the recovery period
Nurse <-- ":System" : **12** after the recovery period, sends SMS message informing the SNS user that he can leave the vaccination center

@enduml
